text:
Hello i happy to ask something and i happy also get a little help i will try install geoip from home for only try and i get error i try install like from makefile
./configure --prefix=/home/mircx/  --config-dir=ETCDIR --enable-kqueue --disable-interactive  --module-dir=/home/mircx/  --binary-dir=bin --with-cc=clang++ --log-dir=INSPIRCD_LOGDIR  --data-dir= --uid=INSPIRCD_UID --enable-ipv6
